ddls:
CREATE TABLE "statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statement */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author who made the statement */,
  "statement" TEXT /* The full statement made by the author */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the statement */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the statement was made */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target of the statement */,
  "verdict_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the verdict of the statement */,
  "statement_without_stopwords" TEXT /* Statement with stop words removed */,
  "lemm" TEXT /* Lemmatized version of the statement */,
  "stemmed" TEXT /* Stemmed version of the statement */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the statement */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the statement was made */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment analysis score */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the fact-checking result */,
  "spread_count" INTEGER /* Number of shares or views of the statement */,
  "first_seen_date" TEXT /* First date the statement was observed */,
  "last_seen_date" TEXT /* Last date the statement was observed */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the statement is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statements_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statements_verdict_id FOREIGN KEY ("verdict_id") REFERENCES verdicts ("verdict_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statements_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statements_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "author_type" TEXT /* Type of author (e.g., public figure, influencer, journalist) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "reputation_score" REAL /* Reputation score of the author */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the author */,
  "facebook_profile" TEXT /* Facebook profile URL of the author */,
  "linkedin_profile" TEXT /* LinkedIn profile URL of the author */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the author is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., news article, social media post) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or reference to the source */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the source (e.g., example.com) */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* Estimated reach of the source */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score of the source */,
  "is_trusted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the source is trusted */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the source is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of target (e.g., political entity, individual) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the target (e.g., political, medical) */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the target */,
  "is_influencer" INTEGER /* Indicates if the target is an influencer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the target is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "verdicts" (
  "verdict_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verdict */,
  "verdict_name" TEXT /* Name of the verdict (e.g., true, false, pants-fire) */,
  "verdict_description" TEXT /* Description of the verdict */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the verdict (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "evidence_source" TEXT /* Source of evidence for the verdict */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("verdict_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fact-checker, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is an admin */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "is_external" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is external (e.g., from a partner organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the statement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the statement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the statement */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fact_checking_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statement being fact-checked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the fact-check */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was created */,
  "log_action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., verify, update, reject) */,
  "log_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the action */,
  "evidence" TEXT /* Supporting evidence for the log action */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the log action is resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fact_checking_logs_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES statements ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fact_checking_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources_credibility" (
  "source_credibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credibility rating */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source being rated */,
  "credibility_score" REAL /* Credibility score (0-10) */,
  "credibility_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the credibility rating */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the credibility score was last updated */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the credibility score is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_credibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sources_credibility_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_credibility" (
  "target_credibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credibility rating */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target being rated */,
  "credibility_score" REAL /* Credibility score (0-10) */,
  "credibility_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the credibility rating */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the credibility score was last updated */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the credibility score is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_credibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_credibility_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statement_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statement being changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., edit, update, delete) */,
  "change_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the change */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  "is_reverted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the change was reverted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statement_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statement_history_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statement_sources" (
  "statement_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statement-source link */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statement */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statement_sources_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES statements ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statement_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statement_targets" (
  "statement_target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statement-target link */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statement */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statement_targets_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES statements ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statement_targets_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statement_verifications" (
  "verification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verification */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statement being verified */,
  "verifier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the verification */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date when the verification was performed */,
  "verification_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the verification */,
  "evidence" TEXT /* Supporting evidence for the verification */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the verification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("verification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statement_verifications_verifier_id FOREIGN KEY ("verifier_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statement_verifications_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statement_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statement being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is flagged for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statement_comments_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES statements ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statement_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES statement_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statement_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statement_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statement */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., language, region) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statement_metadata_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES statements ("statement_id")
)
